start_urls.title: Indeed search URLs
start_urls.description: List of Indeed job search URLs to scrape (e.g. https://www.indeed.com/jobs?q=python+developer&l=Remote).

about_me.title: About Me / Job Titles
about_me.description: Your profile or target job titles, one per line. Used by JobBERT-v2 to score each listing.
about_me.prefill:
Software Engineer
Backend Developer
Python Developer

max_jobs.title: Max Jobs to Collect
max_jobs.description: Stop after this many jobs pass the match threshold.

per_company_jobs.title: Max Jobs Per Company
per_company_jobs.description: Cap on how many jobs from the same company to include.

min_match_percentage.title: Minimum Match % (AI filter)
min_match_percentage.description: Jobs scoring below this threshold are skipped.

concurrency.title: Concurrency (browser workers)
concurrency.description: Number of parallel listing + processing workers. Each spawns its own browser context.

ignore_companies.title: Ignore Companies
ignore_companies.description: One company name per line. Jobs from these companies are skipped.

ignore_related.title: Ignore Keywords
ignore_related.description: One keyword per line. Jobs whose description contains any of these are skipped.

google_sheet_url.title: Google Sheet URL (optional)
google_sheet_url.description: Full URL of the Google Sheet to export results to. Leave blank to skip.

sheet_name.title: Google Sheet Tab Name
sheet_name.description: Worksheet tab name to write results into.

google_sheets_credentials.title: Google Sheets Service Account (JSON)
google_sheets_credentials.description: Paste your Google service-account JSON here as an object. Required only if google_sheet_url is provided.

headless.title: Headless Browser
headless.description: Run the browser in headless mode. Disable only for local debugging.
